clusters.title: Tail failure path has no regression test

member_findings.title: Tail failure path has no regression test
member_findings.impact: If tail cannot read the resolved log file, run should return BaseCommand.FAILURE and report the stderr. The current tests only cover successful tail output and validation failures before tail runs, so a change that ignores tail errors or still returns success would pass.
member_findings.fix: Add a run-path test with subprocess.run returning a non-zero returncode and stderr, then assert the command returns BaseCommand.FAILURE and does not print successful log output.
